SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 1)) AS h3index FROM hexagons;
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 2)) AS h3index FROM test_hexagons WHERE h3index > 644325529233966509;
CREATE TABLE offset_hexagons (h3index UInt64, offset UInt64);
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index + offset, 1)) AS h3index FROM offset_hexagons;
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, k)) AS h3index FROM (SELECT h3index FROM hexagons) AS subquery, (SELECT number AS k FROM system.numbers LIMIT 2) AS k_values;
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 3)) AS h3index FROM hexagons WHERE h3index IN (SELECT h3index FROM test_hexagons);
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 1)) AS h3index FROM another_hexagons UNION SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 2)) FROM test_hexagons;
WITH (SELECT h3index FROM hexagons) AS h3_indexes SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 1)) AS h3index FROM h3_indexes;
CREATE TABLE combined_hexagons (h3index UInt64, radius UInt64);
SELECT arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, radius)) AS h3index FROM combined_hexagons;
SELECT h3index, arrayJoin(h3kRing(h3index, 1)) AS neighbors FROM hexagons WHERE h3index = 644325529233966508;
